cataseo.description: AI-powered product descriptions and SEO meta for WooCommerce. Coexists with Yoast, Rank Math, and AIOSEO.
cataseo.connect_description: Connect your store to CataSEO to start optimizing your product SEO with AI.
cataseo.connect_disclaimer: You will be asked to approve read and write access to your products. This is required for SEO optimization.
cataseo.connected_description: Manage SEO optimization, bulk operations, and billing on the external platform.

cataseo-dev.description: AI-powered product descriptions and SEO meta for WooCommerce. Coexists with Yoast, Rank Math, and AIOSEO.
cataseo-dev.connect_description: Connect your store to CataSEO to start optimizing your product SEO with AI.
cataseo-dev.connect_disclaimer: You will be asked to approve read and write access to your products. This is required for SEO optimization.
cataseo-dev.connected_description: Manage SEO optimization, bulk operations, and billing on the external platform.

trusync.description: Automatic order and inventory synchronization with QuickBooks Online.
trusync.connect_description: Connect your store to TruSync to start syncing orders and inventory with QuickBooks Online.
trusync.connect_disclaimer: You will be asked to approve read and write access to your store. This is required for order and inventory synchronization.
trusync.connected_description: Manage order sync, inventory, and billing on the external platform.
